name: Search Recall Optimization - RRF & Ranking Parameters

description: Baseline: RRF k=60, score scaling (0.2 + score*3.5), synthetic consensus test. Measuring recall@100 on synthetic 3-way fusion (vector+BM25+fuzzy). Baseline established at 85%.

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline for RRF recall. Synthetic benchmark creates reproducible ranking scenario with 3 signals.
asi.test_scenario: 3-way RRF fusion with k=60, consensus measurement on top-10 results

description: Increased RRF top-rank bonuses: r1=0.12 (was 0.05), r23=0.06 (was 0.02). Testing consensus-focused ranking with multi-metric evaluation (recall, precision, NDCG, contextual relevance).

asi.hypothesis: Increased top-rank bonuses (r1=0.12, r23=0.06) should improve consensus-based recall. Multi-metric benchmark now measures recall, precision, NDCG, contextual relevance.
asi.note: Precision and NDCG parsing issues in output - need to fix extraction

description: Tried k=45 + score scaling 2.5. No change in synthetic benchmark (already at 100% recall). Suggests bonus tuning is complete. Moving to test metadata ranking impact.

asi.hypothesis: Reduce RRF k from 60 to 45 for more aggressive consensus detection. Also reduced score scaling from 3.5 to 2.5.
asi.result: recall unchanged (100%), suggesting bonuses are already optimal. Next: focus on metadata ranking impact.
